docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: SERVICE ATTEMPTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, MAURICIA
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-02-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-10-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-22-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE DISMISSAL OF MARCH 3, 2017 IS SET ASIDE. THE DEFENDANT AGREES TO ACCEPT PAYMENT OF $1,200.00 BY CHECK AS FULL PAYMENT FOR THE CAR. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PURSUANT TO THE MARCH 6, 2017 ORDER IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARED AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE THE MATTER WOULD BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINT MAURICIA GARICA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT PAMELA YU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
